name: ieee-latex-writer
description: Open-community Codex skill for IEEE-style LaTeX research manuscripts, reviewer responses, anonymity checks, and submission audits.

interface.shortDescription: Draft, revise, anonymize, and audit IEEE LaTeX papers.
interface.longDescription: IEEE LaTeX Writer Open helps prepare IEEE-style manuscripts with official IEEEtran templates, research narrative checks, reviewer-response workflows, BibTeX cleanup, double-blind anonymity review, and static LaTeX audits.
defaultPrompt: Use $ieee-latex-writer to audit my IEEE paper.
Use $ieee-latex-writer to revise my reviewer response.
Use $ieee-latex-writer to create an IEEEtran draft.
